title: CROP ROTATION: PRACTICAL INFORMATION
subtitle: This factsheet contains complementary information to the Best4Soil video on Crop rotation: practical information https://best4soil.eu/videos/12/en
description: A practical guide on designing and implementing crop rotation schemes to manage soil-borne diseases and pests while maintaining soil health. It includes step-by-step instructions, regional examples, and recommendations for integrating management practices such as cover crops and green manure.
